meaning: adj.缺乏幽默感的 一本正经的
examples: This man was as humourless as a dictionary.
Mr Obama comes across as fluent and well-informed but also somewhat detached and humourless.
She is a sombre, humourless monster although some of her henchman, especially one with two heads, give us a laugh.
Whereas Mr Ramadan comes across as prickly and humourless, Ms Hirsi Ali plays up her glamorous feminine side.
The line is not entirely humourless, with stickers of a hula-hooping watermelon and a happy orange waving a pennant.
